title: iammojogo's Village Info Plus
description: The ULTIMATE village mechanics tool for 1.12.2! Real-time stats, breeding analysis, golem requirements, 3D visualizations, and full customization.
body:
Village Info Plus - Reveal Hidden Village Mechanics

Ever wondered why your villagers won't breed? Why iron golems aren't spawning? Village Info Plus reveals all the hidden mechanics that control villages in Minecraft 1.12.2!

✨ FEATURES

Real-Time Village Statistics

    Population tracking - See total villagers vs counted villagers
    Breeding status - Know exactly when and why villagers can/can't breed
    Iron golem requirements - Clear indicators for golem spawning conditions
    Reputation system - Monitor your standing with the village
    Door counting - Track all valid village doors
    Hidden villager detection - Find AWOL villagers outside the counting box

3D Wireframe Visualizations Toggle clear wireframe boundaries to see exactly how villages work:

    🟡 Counting Box - The 8-block tall area where villagers count toward population cap
    🟢 Breeding Sphere - The full breeding zone (actually a cube!)
    ⚪ Village Radius - Horizontal village boundary circle
    🔵 Golem Spawn Zone - 16×6×16 area where golems spawn
    🟠 Hidden Villagers - Highlights villagers outside counting box
    🟣 Door Safe Zone - Shows detection range around each villager

User-Friendly Interface

    Collapsible sections - Show only what you need
    Draggable panel - Position anywhere on screen
    In-game config GUI - Change settings without editing files
    Checkbox-style toggles - Compact visualization controls
    Configurable wireframe thickness and colors
    Works in survival and creative mode

🎯 WHY THIS MOD?

Village mechanics in 1.12.2 are complex and invisible. Most players don't know:

    Only villagers in an 8-block tall box count toward breeding caps
    The "breeding sphere" is actually a cube
    Iron golems require 10 villagers + 21 doors minimum
    Hidden villagers outside the counting box can breed infinitely
    Villagers must be within 15-16 blocks to detect new doors

This mod makes the invisible visible, letting you optimize villages like a pro!

📦 INSTALLATION

    Install Minecraft Forge 1.12.2 (version 14.23.5.2859 or higher)
    Download Village Info Plus
    Place the .jar file in your mods folder
    Launch Minecraft

🎮 HOW TO USE

Basic Controls:

    Press / to toggle the village info panel
    Click section headers to collapse/expand
    Click checkboxes to toggle visualizations
    Drag the header to reposition panel

Understanding the Display:

    🟢 Green - Good status
    🟡 Yellow - Warning/caution
    🔴 Red - Problem/not ready

🏆 OPTIMIZE YOUR VILLAGE

Infinite Breeding Setup: Build a platform 5+ blocks above or below village center Y-level. Villagers there will be in the breeding zone but outside the counting box - they can breed infinitely!

Iron Golem Farm:

    Minimum: 10 counted villagers + 21 doors
    Golems spawn in the cyan 16×6×16 zone
    Cap: 1 golem per 10 villagers

Increase Population: Population cap = floor(Doors × 0.35)

    21 doors = 7 villagers max
    30 doors = 10 villagers max
    60 doors = 21 villagers max

⚙️ CONFIGURATION

All settings editable in-game via Mods menu, or edit config/villageinfo.cfg:

    Keybind (default: Numpad Divide)
    Text scale and wireframe thickness
    All overlay colors (RGB + alpha)
    Feature toggles

🔧 COMPATIBILITY

Works with JEI, JourneyMap, Xaero's Minimap, Optifine, and most client-side mods.

Requirements:

    Minecraft 1.12.2
    Forge 14.23.5.2859+
    Client-side only (no server installation needed)

📝 LICENSE

MIT License - Free to use, modify, and redistribute

🐛 FOUND A BUG?

Report issues to iammojogo@outlook.com!

💡 CREDITS

Developer: iammojogo Built with Minecraft Forge

Download now and take control of your villages! 🏘️
